content.question: Whether regional variation in the willingness and capacity of school maintainers (state, church, municipal) to support a phase-out would make uniform national implementation infeasible, or whether local political coalitions could be engineered to enable region-by-region adoption.
content.reduction_path: Structured interviews with representatives of state school districts, church maintainers, and municipal governments in high- and low-segregation regions, identifying explicit conditions under which each would support, oppose, or conditionally support a phase-out.
